data.content: Review rejected: the branch does not pass bunx tsc --noEmit because src/lib/__tests__/terminal-manager-knots-next-guard.test.ts contains unresolved merge conflict markers (for example lines 356-415) and a typed mock.calls filter that currently fails TS checking. The active-view change in src/app/beats/page.tsx and its regression test look directionally correct, but the implementation review cannot be approved until the conflict is resolved and repo sanity gates pass.
